analysis.momentum: Neutral momentum with RSI at 49.51, price action indicates a slight downtrend but no strong selling pressure.
analysis.trade_plan: Consider buying on dips towards TV Pivot Support levels, with a target of breaking above TV Pivot Resistance. Monitor DXY and real yields for potential shifts in safe-haven demand.
